title: Bing's Auto Attack
description: It auto attacks when you hold left click!
body:
## Description
**Bing's Auto Attack** is a simple yet effective Minecraft mod that automatically performs attacks when you hold the left-click button. Designed to make combat easier and less repetitive, this mod is perfect for players who want to streamline their gameplay. Whether you're fighting mobs or bosses, it helps you stay focused on movement and strategy while reducing the strain of constant clicking. Lightweight and easy to use, it's a great addition for anyone seeking a smoother combat experience in Minecraft.
